reviews.review_description: I've been toying with this on my mac for a few weeks now, I found it quite useful except for the fact I have to use my mac keyboard and mouse, I really wanted to be able to use my mac from another room, my quest 3 just updated to ver. 25, and now I'm able to control the mac with hand tracking 🤗🤗

I hear nothing i tryed everything (reddit, meta helop, chatgpt) , i can only with air link...   (quest3)
no screen preset to load and save the display layout the display layout (and attached). Like with my screen arms, i have préférence like my mailbox on the left  portrait orientation and 2 others on the right in the other orientation.

Regularly, updates prevent me from easily reconnecting. the same thing happens if the headset goes into standby mode for an AFKBIO break.

I've been using it a lot to do software development work since my MacBook only has a 14 inch screen. Makes it a lot easier to review code and everything. Only complaint was it seemed to freeze and I'd have to reconnect every 10 or so minutes but I realized I only had 5 GB of storage left on my laptop after getting that to at least 25 gbs I haven't had the issue.
I am hacked Remote Desktop has access to everything i have not even given permission
Never had a problem connecting my laptop to my 3s (playing games). Clear pic with no drag in action
the quest 2 does not support this application. i have no idea why this shows up for download.
Bad

What a great app, you too can sit like a complete knob staring at a QR code, whilst your headset helpfully plays a spinning dot logo, whilst completely failing to find your (or ANY..) PC. Such progress! smh.
(Yes I had the link app installed).
(yes the pc and headset were logged onto the same WiFi network).
(no, the headset neither read, or gave any indication of reading the QR code...).

TLDR:- It doesn't work.
The end, badum-tiss.

I couldn’t connect my Meta Quest 3s despite following all the steps (I made sure that my PC and the headset were connected on the same network, I downloaded the app via a link the headset sent to my email, then I stared at a QR code ￼my headset couldn’t read.) ￼Which is confusing because my headset can read QR if I want to connect to Wi-Fi. ￼
connection works amazing... but the bluetooth keyboard paired to my meta quest doesn't work. Whyyyyyyyyy? worthless to me

This actually does appear to be more stable then either Virtual Desktop or Steam link. You do have to have a connection to the computer with your peripherals it doesn't route your peripherals through your quest. Computer has to be powered on and unlocked to connect. 

This is basically a VR wrapper for Remote Desktop with an easy set up pairing. And ratios are now working

reviews.review_title: You took away my favorite feature
reviews.review_description:
Multi-screen in theater mode was incredible while multiscreen was in beta, but since it seemingly went full release, theater mode can only affect one window now :/

If this gets brought back, I'd give an extra star.

If they can nail down the slight bugginess when setting up multiscreen mode, that would get you to 5
Not working,  Not losing you money like me

reviews.review_title: I  tried to link this to Mac Mini.
reviews.review_description: I  tried to link this to Mac Mini and I couldn’t see a folder so I could start moving my photos over to my Mac Mini.

I'm giving a 5★ review based on the open idea that this will improve. It was relatively easy to setup with a Windows 11 PC. Audio passthrough output from computer to headset just works, without the user needing to configure anything. Image is clear and 3 screens are available as advertised. 

However, the strange shortcoming is that it is NOT an actual Remote Desktop. The Remote Desktop can't be controlled by the controllers or by hand tracking... so I'm questioning what the use case is. 
How this is presented is somewhat misleading, as though I can walk away from my PC and be anywhere like on my patio or balcony and spatially compute INDEPENDENT of my PC.

Again, I can't interact with my virtual Remote Desktop through the controllers or hand tracking, so what is "remote" about it? 
Please add this feature...
Every day I have to update this app. Otherwise it runs great.
Black screen. Used to work great.

The new update has broken the app connecting the headset the easy way. USE THE SECOND OPTION to connect the headset. This means you'll have to CLICK THE OLDER WINDOWS' OPTION in the app on your headset. This will send you a link through email to download a different meta app to your PC and connect the headset that way. Hope this helps! I enjoy the app and hope they fix it soon. 

Actual Review: This is a screen mirroring app. You can't control what's on the screen with meta quest controllers. Sadly, you'll have to use your computers mouse and keyboard. But you can create up to 3 screens at a time even though your computer only has one, plus it's free!

reviews.review_title: Shocking Waste of time CAUTION VIEW ONLY
reviews.review_description: Why? you can view a pc screen remotely. That is all it does. If you expect ANY control you will be disappointed
I don't know why even try this thing is so buggy.

I once used this application regularly, but the fact that I can't restrict connections to solely my local network is both a security concern and a significant performance hit in the form of bandwidth and latency. For my use cases, there's no reason at all for potentially sensitive data to be transmitted over the internet. If this were fixed, more transparency added regarding how non-local screen recordings are being handled, and some indicator added that the connection is local, it'd be much more viable as a replacement for a physical arrangement of monitors. It'd be a major selling point for headsets, too.

The lack of transparency is why I give this such a poor rating.
Since the latest update doesnt this app work at all anymore. Used to use it alot, fix it will ya?
This is a complete waste of time! I want to control my PC or Laptop remotely not just look at a larger screen!
Took me 5 tries to connect only to find out you can't control the PC from the headset. What's the point then? "Working" in VR? Who wants that?
This does not offer any control with the remote connection.  It is only for casting you desktop screen to VR.  IMO Meta needs to add the missing functions or rename the app to prevent consusion.

reviews.review_title: Game changing for my home office setup
reviews.review_description:
Connected to my PC with no problem. The audio is a bit of an issue for me because I normally just use the speakers built into my monitors; When i connect it turns off my monitors, thereby disabling the speakers... my computer doesn't detect any audio source, so no sound is mirrored in the Quest. My work around for that is that I just use Bluetooth headphones for my speakers and microphone. Maybe I will plug in some cheap speakers and that will work but I'm not too worried about it. What I would really like to see is the ability to change the angle of the three screen positions. I feel like they are 15 to 20 degree angles off of the center one. 45 to 60 would be better for sure. 

Hoping there are some updates coming soon with that regard.
You will go through steps in hope that they work. After 5 attempts…you realize it doesn’t work. It never did…
The worst of the worst

reviews.review_title: Utter PoS that will brick your PC
reviews.review_description:
Hey kids! How would you like to dowoad the brand new remote desktop app THAT DOESN'T WORK WITHOUT PC MONITOR OR ANOTHER REMOTE DESKTOP?! 

TF IS THE POINT OF REMOTE PC DESKTOP APP THAT - 1. REQUIRES QR CODE FROM THE (NONEXISTENT) PC MONITOR THAT IT SUPPOSED TO REPLACE OR ACT AS SPARE IN NEED. 2. IF YOUR PC MONITOR OR IN MY CASE REMOTE DESKTOP INSTALLED ON QUEST 3 IS NOT ON IT WILL NOT WORK. 3. ACTIVELY TRIES TO INSTALL SOME RANDOM BS ON YOU PC.

Seriously Meta and Microsoft Devs - what where you taking when developing this app? I get it. This is still Alpha test even with recent patch, BUT WHY ARE YOU TRYING TO CREATE SECOND PC SCREEN THAT DOESN'T WORK WITH PHYSICAL OR ANOTHER VR SCREEN APP? THERE IS ALREADY MAGICAL AND 1000,000 TIMES BETTER APP CALLED VIRTUAL DESKTOP THAT YOU ARE BASICALLY TRYING TO REINVENT, INSTEAD OF ATTEMPTING TO COMPETE WITH IT AND IT IS WORKING AS ITS OWN VR SCREEN WITHOUT ANY HOURS UPIN HOURS OF FRASTRUATING FLAMING TURD HOOPS TRYING TO INSTALL THIS TURD, THAT REQUIRES HAND HOLDING TO WORK. 

I got this app, thinking this would be amazing addition to already existing Steam Link and Virtual Desktop, but so far it has proven to be DANGEROUS TO INSTALL since it goes haywire and IT REQUIRES PHYSICAL OR VIRTUAL COMPUTER MONITOR TO WORK LIKE IN MY CASE VIRTUAL DESKTOP ACTIVE AND THIS POS PIGGYBACKING OFF FROM VIRTUAL DESKTOP TO WORK!
this remote desktop app is "view-only", the app is of no use whatsoever if you can't actually "control" your pc ...

It's like having a second screen on your quest, but you can't interact with your computer. Yes, it's useful for me because my laptop screen is broken, but other than that specific situation it doesn't have much use. Instead, you're going to use Quest Link, which has a lot more utility. But you'll sacrifice quality and latency.
This app fails to load.  After reading the reviews, it seems to be an issue on Meta's end.  Going to have to return the headset and look at different options
...and this one only allows for one display? I bought a Q3 just for working in Workrooms on Mac with three virtual displays ... now this is not possible anymore??? Really disapointing.

reviews.review_title: Should be called see your comp screen
reviews.review_description: Really disappointed that all this application does is show your screen.  Remote desktop means that you can actually do work remote work.   Very disappointed.

For some reason, this app decided to install, download, or whatever it did, over 1 million JSON files while I was on my computer and someone else in the house was using the VR. I wish that was an exaggeration but it is not because these files were numbered!. This did not allow my computer to boot up because it placed them all in my computer's OS drive. I was forced to take out that drive, wipe it, and reinstall my operating system. FIX THIS NONSENSE META!!!

Connects but no interaction or control (as advertised)

Pretty much useless :(
can't move the pointer, can't click on anything, all I can do is view the screen, I can not interact with it.
It says my desktop is available but does not work no matter what I try. Just use the Virtual Desktop app for remote display that works fine for me.
Installation easy and fast but no interaction with the controllers. It seems promising app, but for now it is useless
